Definition: Fiberoptic bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage performed to identify cause of acute respiratory failure in cancer patients.

Label: Diagnostic yield
Synonym: Diagnostic yield for identifying cause of acute respiratory failure

Label: Prone positioning
Definition: Placing patients with severe ARDS in the prone position during mechanical ventilation.

Label: Noninvasive Positive Pressure Ventilation
Definition: Noninvasive positive pressure ventilation for treatment of acute respiratory failure secondary to severe acute respiratory syndrome.
Synonym: noninvasive positive pressure ventilation for SARS-related acute respiratory failure

Label: Non-invasive positive pressure ventilation for acute respiratory failure
Synonym: NIPPV for SARS-related acute respiratory failure

Label: Intensive Care Unit stay duration
Synonym: Shorter ICU stay in SARS-related ARF

Label: chest radiography
Synonym: Lower chest radiography score in SARS-related ARF

Label: SARS transmission prevention
Synonym: No SARS transmission to healthcare workers

Label: Intensive Care Unit-Acquired Weakness
Synonym: Muscle weakness and atrophy due to ICU stay

Label: Functional impairment
Synonym: Impaired functional capacity in ALI survivors

Label: Tidal volume ventilation
Definition: Lower tidal volume ventilation facilitated by extracorporeal carbon dioxide removal for the treatment of acute hypoxemic respiratory failure.
Synonym: lower tidal volume ventilation facilitated by extracorporeal carbon dioxide removal

Label: Tidal volume ventilation
Synonym: Lower tidal volume ventilation facilitated by extracorporeal carbon dioxide removal

Label: Acute respiratory distress syndrome
Definition: Imbalance between 92 kDa gelatinase (92 G'ase) and tissue inhibitor of metalloproteinases-1 (TIMP) may drive extracellular matrix turnover and aberrant lung remodeling in acute respiratory distress syndrome (ARDS).
Synonym: Matrix metalloproteinase and TIMP regulation in ARDS

Label: Acute respiratory distress syndrome
Synonym: Elevation of 92 kDa gelatinase in ARDS
